reasoning: The ECB Deposit Facility Rate has been consistently held at 2.0% since June 2025. Following the October 30, 2025 monetary policy meeting where rates were also held, market consensus strongly projects that rates will remain flat well into 2026 or potentially be cut further to 1.75% or 1.50%. No mainstream analyst expects a rate increase by early 2026. Furthermore, there are no scheduled ECB meetings between Nov 9, 2025, and Dec 9, 2025, making any rate changes prior to those dates almost impossible barring an emergency intervention. I'm providing baseline minimum probabilities (0.05) for the near-term dates and moderately scaling up uncertainty by February 2026 to account for macroeconomic unpredictability.
